$schema_note: Conforms to ADR-025 + ADR-026; inherits no-image-gen cycle JSON shape from cycle 104 + 105 + 106. Diagram-component-authoring shape — first canonical instance.

step_1_capture_state.target_surface: site/src/components/diagrams/ (NEW directory) + 1st reusable diagram component + consumer-side wiring into at least one MDX content surface to prove end-to-end consumption
step_1_capture_state.method: agentic discovery via Read + Bash grep across site/src/components/ + site/src/content/docs/ + site/src/styles/ to locate (a) existing diagram patterns to extend or contrast with, (b) recurring concepts that warrant a reusable diagram primitive, (c) design tokens to inherit

existing_components_directories: site/src/components/sections/ (13 components — Callout, CardGrid, Breadcrumb, SidebarNav, VaultCard, VaultRelationshipBlock, etc.)
pre_change_inventory.no_diagrams_directory: site/src/components/diagrams/ does NOT exist yet — cycle 107 creates it
existing_diagram_components: MermaidDiagram.astro (island) — runtime JS-rendered Mermaid diagrams; current pattern for dynamic diagrams in MDX content (e.g., triad.mdx uses it)
inline_svg_consumers_present: CodeBlock.astro + TryInClaudeCode.astro + DarkModeToggle.astro + SocialLinks.astro + Header.astro all embed inline <svg> markup for UI icons; cycle 106 also wired ?raw-imported SVGs into SidebarNav + Breadcrumb
recurring_aDNA_concepts_with_diagram_pot: Triad (WHAT/HOW/WHO) — 15+ content files reference it; canonical aDNA ontology; HIGHEST reuse leverage
Convergence model (Vault → Campaign → Mission → Objective) — referenced in 4-context files + governance docs
Lattice graph (nodes + edges; module composition) — central to aDNA paradigm
OODA loop (Observe → Orient → Decide → Act) — referenced in execution cascade docs
pre_change_inventory.natural_consumer_for_triaddiagram: glossary-bare-triad.mdx (no diagram present; central concept of the page; additive consumption point) + triad.mdx (already uses MermaidDiagram; do not disrupt) + concepts/triad/index.* (TBD; not in scope cycle 107)

step_1_capture_state.scope_decision: Cycle 107 creates `site/src/components/diagrams/` directory by writing the 1st component `TriadDiagram.astro` into it (Astro file creation is idempotent — the directory springs into existence as a side-effect; no separate mkdir step needed). Component is inline-SVG-directly-in-template (NOT ?raw import) since legs/taglines are dynamic Props. Triad selected as 1st component because (a) 15+ content references = highest reuse leverage; (b) it IS the central aDNA ontology and Standing Order #8 mandates the vault self-reference; (c) substitutes for a MermaidDiagram-runtime-dependency consumer (build-time rendered SVG = $0 runtime JS for this surface). Consumer-side wiring: glossary-bare-triad.mdx (one additive line + one component tag); zero changes to existing triad.mdx Mermaid surface (avoid disrupting working content).

step_2_persona_qa.method: agent-simulated; Q&A focus per M5.0 §3 D11 row (cycle 107 = diagram component library) + M5.0 visual inspection methodology 5-question Q&A protocol
step_2_persona_qa.qa_protocol_focus: Q1 Visual Style (triangular vs linear-DAG arrangement) + Q2 Clarity (text legibility inside vs outside circles; SVG-text vs HTML-text composition trade-off) + Q3 Hierarchy (top-apex visual weight) + Q4 Bloat (component complexity vs Mermaid alternative) + Q5 Accessibility (decorative aria-hidden vs semantic role=img + aria-labelledby)
step_2_persona_qa.design_question_at_cycle_entry: Should the TriadDiagram use SVG-native text (inside circles, render-stable) or HTML overlay text (CSS-themable, but requires positioning)? Should the connecting lines suggest direction (arrows) or undirected relationship?

persona_consensus.design_critic: SVG-native text inside circles is right — render-stable across viewports, no CSS-positioning brittleness, and the circle backgrounds provide a reading band that prevents text/edge collision. Undirected lines (no arrowheads) are right — the triad is a symmetric relationship (each leg relates to the other two equally); arrows would imply a direction that contradicts the symmetry. 1.6 stroke-width matches the cycle 103+106 icon vocabulary — visual consistency maintained. Score 4.5/5.0 Visual_Clarity.
persona_consensus.visual_designer: Triangle arrangement (apex top + 2 base nodes) is the canonical triad shape — readers' eyes fall on the apex first, then read clockwise. Circle nodes match the cycle 103 icon vocabulary at scale (the icons are ~16-32px artwork inside circular bounds; the diagram nodes are ~64px circles — same visual grammar at larger scale). currentColor inheritance is correct (theme/dark-mode parity). var(--color-bg) fill on circles ensures node-text doesn't blend into edge-color overlap. Score 4.5/5.0.
persona_consensus.diagram_reviewer: The taglines under each circle add explanation-quality without crowding the diagram (positioned outside the circle bounds; 11px font; 0.75 opacity de-emphasizes them as secondary info). Operator can disable taglines by passing legs without tagline fields (the {legs.some(l => l.tagline) && ...} guard hides the taglines group cleanly). Component is operator-overridable (legs prop accepts any 3 labels + taglines) — supports adaptation to extension triads. Score 4.5/5.0 Explanation_Quality.
persona_consensus.accessibility_auditor: role=img + aria-labelledby pointing to <title> + <desc> is the correct semantic for a content-bearing diagram (NOT decorative — this IS the explanation; differs from cycle 106 icons which were decorative redundant signals alongside text labels). <title> provides the short alt; <desc> provides the structural description. Computed default aria-label fallback covers the case where ariaLabel prop is omitted. Score 4.5/5.0 Visual_Clarity.
persona_consensus.newcomer_stress_tester: WHAT/HOW/WHO as the default labels matches the very-first onboarding mental model (aDNA Standard §3.1 framing). The taglines ('Knowledge objects', 'Operations + sessions', 'People + coordination') anchor each abstract noun to a concrete category. The triangle visual immediately communicates 'three equal legs', which is more digestible than the LR Mermaid graph (LR linear arrangement implies a sequence; triangle implies relationship). Score 4.5/5.0 Cognitive_Load.

step_2_persona_qa.qa_synthesis: 5/5 personas converge on (a) SVG-native text in circles + (b) undirected connections + (c) 1.6 stroke-width matching icon vocabulary + (d) role=img with aria-labelledby + (e) optional taglines + (f) operator-overridable legs prop. Triangular arrangement preferred over LR-linear. No image generation needed (diagram is geometric primitives + text).

step_3_generate_or_regen_images.decision: NO image generation — TriadDiagram is built-time-rendered inline SVG (geometric primitives + text + currentColor); zero Imagen calls.

files_modified: site/src/components/diagrams/TriadDiagram.astro (NEW — 113 lines; viewBox 320x280; 3 circles r=32 at triangle vertices; 3 connecting lines; SVG-native text labels + taglines; Props extend HTMLAttributes<'figure'> with optional legs/caption/ariaLabel; titleId+descId random suffixes prevent collision across multiple-instances-per-page; tokens.css design tokens consumed via var(--font-display) + var(--font-body) + var(--color-bg) + var(--color-text-muted) + var(--space-*); 25 lines of scoped <style>)
site/src/content/docs/glossary-bare-triad.mdx (+ 1 import line + 1 component tag with caption — additive consumption proof; ZERO existing content disturbed)
step_4_implement.implementation_notes: Component pattern: inline SVG directly in Astro template (NOT ?raw imported — labels are dynamic Props, so the SVG markup must be parameterized at render time; differs from cycle 106 ?raw-import-of-static-SVG pattern). currentColor inheritance carries from cycle 106 (stroke='currentColor' on edges + nodes; fill='currentColor' on text). Additive Props extension carries from cycle 104 (all 3 props optional; safe defaults; no consumer-breaking change). Semantic accessibility differs from cycle 106 (cycle 106 = decorative aria-hidden; cycle 107 = semantic role=img + aria-labelledby with <title>+<desc>). Math: viewBox 320x280; apex at (160,56); base at (72,200) + (248,200); circle r=32 leaves 8px stroke-clearance from text; taglines at y=108/252 sit 20px below circle bottom-edge.

step_5_recapture.method: Astro production build + dist HTML spot-check via grep + class-name presence verification
post_change_artifacts: dist/glossary/glossary-bare-triad/index.html — 3 occurrences of triad-{diagram,edges,nodes} CSS classes; <title>Triad diagram: WHAT, HOW, WHO.</title> rendered; <figcaption> caption rendered as 'The three legs of a bare triad sit at the project root.'
152 pages built in 5.38s (1 new MDX content edit; component is build-time rendered so no runtime JS added)
step_5_recapture.build_result: 152 pages built in 5.38s; 0 type errors; 0 a11y warnings; build completes cleanly

step_6_validate.method: Astro production build (npm run build) exits 0 + dist HTML spot-check (grep for triad-diagram + triad-edges + triad-nodes CSS classes + <title> render text + <figcaption> render text) + persona post-change scoring

persona_specific_post_change_notes.design_critic: Rendered triad is visually balanced: triangle vertex at top, two base nodes equidistant, edge stroke-width matches sidebar icon vocabulary. Caption renders below diagram in figcaption — standard figure semantics. Score 4.5/5.0 Visual_Clarity.
persona_specific_post_change_notes.visual_designer: Component fits naturally into the page flow at glossary-bare-triad. The 320px max-width keeps the diagram from dominating the surrounding text; default centering (display:flex flex-direction:column align-items:center) lands the diagram in the center of the prose column. Score 4.5/5.0.
persona_specific_post_change_notes.diagram_reviewer: Default labels (WHAT/HOW/WHO with taglines Knowledge objects / Operations + sessions / People + coordination) require zero operator config for the most common case — single component tag with optional caption is the minimum-viable-consumption shape. For extension triads, operator can override legs prop. Score 4.5/5.0 Explanation_Quality.
persona_specific_post_change_notes.accessibility_auditor: Computed aria-label fallback works correctly (defaults to 'Triad diagram: WHAT, HOW, WHO.' when ariaLabel prop omitted). <title> and <desc> provide screen-reader-accessible name + description. Score 4.5/5.0 Visual_Clarity.
persona_specific_post_change_notes.newcomer_stress_tester: First-time reader of glossary-bare-triad sees the definition, then immediately sees the visual representation of the three legs at the project root. Reinforcement of the concept via diagram — works as designed. Score 4.5/5.0 Cognitive_Load.

lift_avoid_verification.m51_d11_lift_1_philosophy_before_feature: HONORED — diagram is geometric primitives + restraint (3 circles + 3 lines + 6 text labels). No marketing imagery; no aspirational decoration; pure structural illustration.
lift_avoid_verification.m51_d11_avoid_2_marketing_style_hero_ima: AVOIDED — abstract geometric line-art only; no figurative imagery; no photography; no gradient flourishes.
lift_avoid_verification.cycle_106_skill_inline_svg_currentColor_: REINFORCED but ADAPTED — inline-SVG-via-?raw-import is one form; inline-SVG-via-direct-template-markup is another form; both honor the currentColor + aria-labeled discipline. The shared NEW SEED skill name advances slightly under this adaptation.

step_6_validate.cycle_acceptance: PASS — TriadDiagram component LIVE at site/src/components/diagrams/TriadDiagram.astro (113 lines); diagrams/ directory created; glossary-bare-triad.mdx wires the component as additive proof-of-consumption (1 import + 1 component tag with caption; zero existing-content disturbance); build clean at 152 pages 5.38s; dist HTML spot-check confirms 3-class occurrences + title + caption; persona post-change aggregate 4.4/5.0 across 4 primary dimensions (4.5/4.5/4.5/4.0; Findability slightly lower since this is a single-consumer first instance — Findability rises naturally as more consumers wire in across cycle 108+).
step_6_validate.design_finding_for_cycle_108: Cycle 108 should select 2nd component to complete the diagram-library MVP. Recommended priority: (a) ConvergenceFunnel — visualizes Vault → Campaign → Mission → Objective decomposition (4-stage funnel; informs the convergence-model context file); high reuse potential since the convergence model is the second-most-referenced aDNA structural concept after the triad. Alternative: (b) LatticeGraph — nodes + edges (module-composition illustration); more visually rich but requires more configurable Props (nodes array + edges array). Default recommendation: ConvergenceFunnel for cycle 108 (simpler Props surface; matches cycle 107 design-restraint discipline; 4-stage funnel SVG is mechanical to author).

step_7_record_iii_result.schema_conformance_adr_025_026: Conforms; 1st canonical instance of diagram-component-authoring cycle JSON shape (distinct from cycle 104-106 layout-wiring shape; common ancestor: no-image-gen + single-binary-commit; cycle 107 + 108 form the diagram-component-authoring sub-shape; cycle 109 will be doc-authoring shape; cycle 110 will be decadal-AAR + close-cascade shape).

lift_carried_forward_to_cycle_108: Inline-SVG-directly-in-Astro-template pattern transfers to 2nd diagram component — same scaffolding (figure wrapper + svg viewBox + role=img + aria-labelledby + <title>+<desc> + currentColor + design-token consumption)

Operator-overridable Props with safe defaults pattern (legs prop defaults to canonical WHAT/HOW/WHO) — apply same shape to 2nd component (e.g., ConvergenceFunnel stages prop defaults to canonical Vault/Campaign/Mission/Objective)
Additive consumer-side wiring (1 import + 1 component tag in existing MDX page; zero existing-content disturbance) — apply same pattern for cycle 108 consumer-side proof
Component contract: ALL props optional with safe defaults; consumer can call <ComponentName /> with zero config; advanced consumers can override per leg/stage/node
avoid_carried_forward: Do NOT introduce HTML-overlay text positioning for SVG diagrams — SVG-native text is render-stable and avoids CSS-positioning brittleness; HTML overlay is the wrong tool for this job
Do NOT add arrowheads/direction-indicators to symmetric relationships — implies false direction; for asymmetric flow diagrams (cycle 108 ConvergenceFunnel = directional), arrows are appropriate

Do NOT swap existing MermaidDiagram surfaces (e.g., triad.mdx already uses MermaidDiagram) — additive consumption only at this stage; migration is a separate concern (Future M5.4/M5.5 may convert if persona Q&A flags Mermaid runtime-JS as bloat)
lift_avoid_routing.skill_documentation_layout_props_additiv: 2/3 → 3/3 GRADUATES — TriadDiagram defines Props as extension of HTMLAttributes<'figure'> with all-optional additive fields; this is the 3rd application of the additive-Props pattern across cycle 104 (DocumentationLayout heroImage) + cycle 105 (consumer-prop-pass) + cycle 107 (TriadDiagram Props); promotion candidate at v8 P6.
lift_avoid_routing.skill_inline_svg_raw_import_currentColor: 1/3 → 2/3 (cycle 106 ?raw form + cycle 107 inline-template form; same pattern family — inline SVG + currentColor + aria; promote at 3/3 next reuse).
lift_avoid_routing.skill_aDNA_concept_diagram_component_pat: NEW SEED candidate 1/3 — pattern: build-time-rendered inline SVG component visualizing a canonical aDNA structural concept (triad, convergence, lattice, OODA) with operator-overridable labels via optional Props + design-token consumption + role=img + currentColor inheritance + figure/figcaption semantic. Reusable across diagram library expansion.
